suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add practical ID-prefix guidance (for example, prefer 6+ characters in tests and manual flows) in addition to the current 4-character minimum to reduce ambiguity in denser workspaces.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: foundation-discovery-integration review observed mixed 6-char and 8-12-char prefix usage while shared guidance currently documents only the minimum length.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require reviewers to re-check referenced files before recording shared-state gaps so stale observations are filtered before reporting.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: foundation-config review reported missing editor.rs, but current codebase contains werk-cli/src/editor.rs.

rejectedObservations.observation: AGENTS.md lists editor.rs but the module does not exist.
services.yaml and architecture updates from foundation-skeleton should be newly applied.
Inline JSON response structs should be standardized immediately.
